title: Inhibitor
description: A small mod for Wynncraft that gives you the option to stop Wynntils from scanning your player data or connecting you to any services
body:
# Inhibitor

Inhibitor is a small mod that uses mixins to allow you to disable a bunch of different wynntils data scraping features.
Disabling these features will break certain functionalities of wynntils but its usually nothing major (e.g. disabling party scraping will break party auto-join).
